/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/game/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/game/components.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/net/transport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/net/session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/net/prediction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/sim/tick_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/sim/snapshot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/sim/input_merge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/sim/command_log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/sim/rng_facade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/replay/encoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/replay/decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/replay/version.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/replay/io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/replay/resume.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/harness/runner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/harness/trace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/util/checksum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/util/logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/util/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/netplay_matrix.dir/src/util/json_scan.cpp.o -o netplay_matrix
